examples: They're standing there, crying, lamenting, and fretting.
When he got down, the five of them were sitting screaming and lamenting quite piteously, each out-doing the other.
Milton has just been lamenting the fact that the laborious days of the poet might not result in a sudden blaze of fame.
While lamenting the lawsuits, school districts blame the federal government for not coughing up enough money.
Now is the time for spiking the football or lamenting that all is doomed.
